extension.description: VS Code extension to run Codex, Claude, and Gemini CLI tools.
command.runCliThinkingOn: CLI Bridge: Run Current CLI (Thinking On)
command.runCliThinkingOff: CLI Bridge: Run Current CLI (Thinking Off)
config.title: CLI Bridge
config.defaultCli.description: Default CLI to run when the extension activates.
config.commands.codex.description: Command used to run Codex CLI.
config.commands.claude.description: Command used to run Claude CLI.
config.commands.gemini.description: Command used to run Gemini CLI.
config.autoOpenPanel.description: Open the CLI Bridge panel automatically on activation.
config.rememberSelectedCli.description: Persist the selected CLI as the default CLI.
config.debug.description: Enable debug logging for CLI stdin/stdout/stderr.
config.locale.description: Extension UI language. Auto follows VS Code display language.
config.macTaskShell.description: macOS shell used to run AI chat tasks (zsh or bash).
config.disableMarketplaceUpdateCheckInDe: Disable VS Code marketplace update checks while running this extension in development mode.
